flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Boricua College rose 50% between 2017 and 2020 ($4.5k → $6.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Boricua College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (401 vs 509).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Boricua College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (41.9% → 33.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Boricua College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.0k → $13.0k).
